description: COUNT with GROUP BY returns non-nullable count alongside the grouping column
name: count_with_group_by
query_sql:
-- @name CountUsersByStatus
-- @returns :many
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users GROUP BY status
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
